tool_args.label: Tremont Av Bus Priority Project
tool_args.raw_text: Tremont Av Bus Priority Project

payload.description: Bus priority project on Tremont Avenue from University Avenue to Bronx River Parkway, including busway from Third Av to Southern Blvd, queue jump signal at Grand Concourse, and gateway offset bus lane from Webster Av to Third Av

evidence_refs.source_quote: Tremont Av Bus Priority Project
Updated Proposal

Fall 2024: Bus Queue Jump Signals at Tremont Av & Grand Concourse • Spring 2025: Busway from Third Av to Southern Blvd – Additional gateway treatment: 4 blocks of offset bus lane approaching busway (Webster Av to Third Av, eastbound only)

tool_args.label: Bus Queue Jump Signal at Grand Concourse & Tremont Av
tool_args.raw_text: Fall 2024: Bus Queue Jump Signals at Tremont Av & Grand Concourse

payload.description: Gives buses a head start, bypassing traffic at major intersections. No change to signal timing – buses share existing Leading Pedestrian Interval (LPI).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Fall 2024: Bus Queue Jump Signals at Tremont Av & Grand Concourse
Bus Queue Jump Signal

Gives buses a head start, bypassing traffic at major intersections • Installed at Grand Concourse & Tremont Av to provide immediate benefit – No change to signal timing – buses share existing Leading Pedestrian Interval (LPI)

normalized_location.raw_text: Webster Avenue to Third Avenue, eastbound only on Tremont Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Additional gateway treatment: 4 blocks of offset bus lane approaching busway (Webster Av to Third Av, eastbound only)
Eastbound Gateway Treatment

To help buses reach the busway, add 4 blocks of offset bus lanes – Webster Av to Third Av, eastbound only – Uniquely, these 4 blocks already have a second eastbound travel lane – Retains most or all parking
